voice.engineLicense: GPL-3.0 (engine, shelled-out-to as external process, not statically linked)
voice.voiceLicenseNote: en_US-lessac explicitly avoided: research-only dataset license per sibling-channel finding
voice.note: Specific per-speaker checkpoint not yet auditioned by ear (Open Gap in research doc) -- pipeline currently pins a default LibriTTS_R speaker id and operator should re-audition before locking production voice.

music.note: Copyright Risk Flag in research doc leaves trending-vs-royalty-free as an explicit operator decision. Pilot defaults to the safe (non-trending) path -- see pipeline music-bed generation for what is actually wired for this pilot vs. still a stub.

sfx.source: @rse/soundfx (CC-0 / CC-BY-3.0), individual soundfx.d/*.mp3 files vendored locally

visualTokens.notes: Blue (calm/gratitude/balance per Reliqio case-study text) was named but not swatched in source -- not used as a hard token, flagged in moodboard Open Gaps.

typography.captionStyle: heavy near-all-caps grotesque/geometric sans (visual impression only, exact family not verified)
typography.emphasisTier: two-tier: default white, one gold (#EFD300) emphasized keyword per caption beat

spacing.infographicReveal: staggered/incremental, one element per speech beat, not all-at-once
spacing.brollDensity: single-subject, near-zero on-screen text during pure b-roll beats

pacing.note: Reference clip's talking-head shots have no faceless equivalent -- adapted shot grammar below maps the observed beat structure onto text/graphics-only primitives, see docs/pilot-mind-mosaic-adaptation.md

motionPersonality.easingNote: avoid bounce/overshoot; favor slow continuous ambient motion (hue-cycling orb) during holds over aggressive spring easing
